modules.name: GENDYN
modules.description: Dynamic stochastic synthesis oscillator based on Xenakis GENDY3
modules.keywords: Xenakis GENDY GENDY3 stochastic random walk dynamic synthesis oscillator

modules.name: Haptik
modules.description: Scanned-synthesis oscillator: a mass-spring ring scanned at audio rate
modules.keywords: scanned synthesis mass-spring ring physical modeling string oscillator

modules.name: Neuron · Axon
modules.description: Spiking-neuron oscillator on the FitzHugh-Nagumo system: relaxation oscillator + excitable (trigger-fired) voice
modules.keywords: FitzHugh Nagumo FHN neuron spike excitable relaxation oscillator phase portrait polyphonic sync voice percussion

modules.name: Neuron · Soma
modules.description: Bursting/chaotic neuron oscillator on the Hindmarsh-Rose system: spike trains, bursts, and chaos from one current control
modules.keywords: Hindmarsh Rose HR neuron burst bursting chaos adaptation oscillator phase portrait polyphonic sync voice percussion

modules.name: Operon
modules.description: Three-phase oscillator on the repressilator gene circuit: three genes repressing each other in a ring, ~120 degrees out of phase
modules.keywords: repressilator Elowitz Leibler gene genetic circuit three phase 3 phase clock biological synthetic biology

modules.name: Bunnies
modules.description: Predator-prey oscillator: prey and predator chase each other a quarter cycle apart. Lotka-Volterra and Rosenzweig-MacArthur modes.
modules.keywords: predator prey Lotka Volterra Rosenzweig MacArthur population ecology two phase limit cycle

modules.name: Foxes
modules.description: Three-species food chain (Hastings-Powell): grass, bunnies, and foxes move from a regular chase through period doubling into deterministic chaos.
modules.keywords: Hastings Powell tritrophic three trophic food chain ecology deterministic chaos strange attractor period doubling grass bunnies foxes predator prey

modules.name: Finches
modules.description: Trait-density ecology: mutation and frequency-dependent competition turn one phenotype into two persistent clusters.
modules.keywords: evolution evolutionary branching adaptive dynamics phenotype trait density mutation diffusion competition disruptive selection diversity speciation finches

modules.name: Islands
modules.description: Four-island Wright-Fisher drift: bounded stochastic allele-frequency CV with selection, mutation, migration, and founder bottlenecks.
modules.keywords: Wright Fisher population genetics genetic drift allele frequency stochastic random modulation islands migration mutation selection fixation sweep founder bottleneck heterozygosity

modules.name: Archipelago
modules.description: Eight-habitat local adaptation: selection follows a spatial environmental gradient while mutation, nearest-neighbor migration, climate, and a barrier shape clines and range shifts.
modules.keywords: local adaptation quantitative trait cline gene flow stepping stone migration selection mutation barrier climate range shift colonization extinction metapopulation spatial ecology
